issues.title: Missing Authoritative Source (spec/22)
issues.why: The module is a derivative of spec/22 (Database, Auth, Errors), but spec/22 is not provided in the context. A mediocre AI cannot verify if the diagrams are actually correct.
issues.fix: Provide spec/22-git-logs-v2 files in the prompt context.

issues.title: External Dependency on xmllint
issues.why: AC-23 mandates a Tier 2 structural-XML diff using 'xmllint --c14n11', which is an external OS-level binary not guaranteed in a standard AI coding environment.
issues.fix: Provide a fallback script or regex-based normalization logic that doesn't require libxml2.

issues.title: Missing .mmd Source Content
issues.why: The spec references 7 active .mmd files (01, 05-10) but the provided context only contains the markdown documentation and puppeteer.json, not the Mermaid sources themselves.
issues.fix: Include the .mmd file contents in the module file list.
